system_config_admin_delete.name: system_config_admin_delete
system_config_admin_delete.using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = ( SELECT (auth.uid())::text AS uid)) AND (profiles.role = 'admin'::text))))

comments_delete.name: comments_delete
comments_delete.using:
((user_id = ( SELECT (auth.uid())::text AS uid)) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = ( SELECT (auth.uid())::text AS uid)) AND (profiles.role = 'admin'::text)))))
